section_title: Using as genuine, forged or counterfeit currency-notes or bank-notes
chapter_title: Of Offences Relating to Documents and to Property Marks
text: Whoever sells to, or buys or receives from, any other person, or otherwise traffics in or uses as genuine, any forged or counterfeit currency-note or bank-note, knowing or having reason to believe the same to be forged or counterfeit, shall be punished with 2 *imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.
